tasks.label: TeX: autobuild documentation.tex
args: if command -v latexmk >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec latexmk -pdf -pvc -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -outdir=build documentation.tex; fi; echo 'latexmk is required for autobuild. Install TeX Live or another LaTeX distribution with latexmk.' >&2; exit 1
